---
title: "Building and maintaining a Bioconductor package: a practical guide"
description: |
  Ossama Edbali spoke about the requirements to get an R package approved for pubication in Bioconductor.
author:
  - name: Ossama Edbali (Research Fellow, Computational Metabolomics)
    url: URL
date: 2026-04-21
categories:
  - bioconductor
image: "../../images/logo_rug.png"
draft: false
lightbox: true # N.B. need blank line between photos for this to work
---

## Overview

## Event details

**Date:** 2026-04-21

**Time:** 15:00

**Location:** Elm House

**Teams**: [Teams link](https://teams.microsoft.com/l/meetup-join/19%3ameeting_NzIyZDdlNGUtZjI5ZC00Yzk5LWJkMjktYmViZWM1YzNhOTFi%40thread.v2/0?context=%7b%22Tid%22%3a%22b024cacf-dede-4241-a15c-3c97d553e9f3%22%2c%22Oid%22%3a%229255ac55-8191-41dc-94ee-df2e74a27860%22%7d)

## About the speaker

## Resources

- [Slides](Building_and_Maintaining_a_Bioconductor_Package.pdf)

<!--

## Photos

Add after the event

![](media/IMG1.jpeg){group="my-gallery"}

![](media/IMG2.jpeg){group="my-gallery"}

![](media/IMG3.jpeg){group="my-gallery"}

-->
